tools.name: search_customer_records
tools.description: Search customer records by free-text query over name, email, and company fields; matching is case-insensitive substring. Returns a JSON list of records (id, name, email, plan) ordered by last activity, at most 25. Returns an empty list — never an error — when nothing matches, so treat [] as 'no such customer'.

q.description: Free-text query, e.g. 'acme' or 'jane@'. Minimum 2 characters; shorter queries return {"error": "query too short"}.

tools.name: normalize_invoice
tools.description: Normalize a raw invoice payload into the canonical schema (snake_case keys, ISO-8601 dates, amounts in cents). Read-only: returns the normalized JSON and never modifies stored data. Returns {"error": ..., "field": ...} naming the first field that fails validation.

input.description: The raw invoice as a JSON string, e.g. '{"Amount": "$12.50", "Date": "3/4/2026"}'.

mode.description: strict: any unparseable field is an error. lenient: unparseable fields are returned under 'unparsed' instead.

tools.name: update_invoice_status
tools.description: Set the status of one invoice. This modifies the stored record; the change is idempotent (setting the same status twice is a no-op) and reversible by setting a previous status. Returns the updated record as JSON, or {"error": "unknown invoice"} with the list of valid ids if the id does not exist.

id.description: Invoice id in the form 'inv_' + 8 lowercase alphanumerics, e.g. 'inv_a1b2c3d4'.

value.description: The new status. 'void' excludes the invoice from revenue reports but does not delete it.

tools.name: send_invoice_reminder
tools.description: Email a payment reminder for one overdue invoice to its billing contact. Side effect: sends a real email; safe to retry only after 24h (the server suppresses duplicates within that window and returns {"suppressed": true}). Returns {"sent": true, "to": ...} on success, or {"error": ...} if the invoice is not overdue or has no billing email. Example: send_invoice_reminder(id='inv_a1b2c3d4', priority='normal').

id.description: Invoice id, e.g. 'inv_a1b2c3d4'. Must reference an overdue invoice.

msg.description: Optional one-paragraph note prepended to the standard reminder template. Plain text; HTML is stripped.

priority.description: urgent adds the account manager in CC. Default behavior when omitted: normal.

tools.name: archive_customer_record
tools.description: Archive one customer record so it stops appearing in search_customer_records results. The record is retained and can be restored; archiving an already-archived record is a no-op that returns {"already_archived": true}. Returns the archived record as JSON, or {"error": "unknown id"} if the id does not exist.

id.description: Customer id in the form 'cus_' + 8 lowercase alphanumerics, e.g. 'cus_9f8e7d6c'.
